summary: Frontend testing of Espace Agenda V3 iteration 5: (1) Header renamed Exemples→Aperçu, (2) Exemples.jsx rewrite with real screenshots, (3) toggle badge layout fix on /offres and /. All 15 test cases passed. Zero regressions detected.

issues: ACCEPTABLE (not a bug): 'text-foreground' and 'bg-primary' found in DOM on /exemples page, but exclusively from shadcn Button component base classes (not from Exemples.jsx own JSX). Inline style overrides apply correctly. Same classes appear on every page that uses Button — this is expected behavior from the UI library.

critical_code_review_comments: No critical issues found. Previous 'Prime' references in content.js (iteration_4 finding) have been fully resolved — no 'Prime' appears on /, /offres, or /exemples.
test_credentials: No auth required for tested pages
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from iterations 1-5 verified working. Key data-testids available: demo-card-therapist, demo-card-osteo, demo-link-therapist, demo-link-osteo, exemples-final-cta, offres-billing-toggle, offres-annual-badge, home-billing-toggle, home-annual-badge. Both images harmonietherapeute.jpg (naturalWidth=1004) and calmeosteo.jpg (naturalWidth=1071) load correctly from /app/frontend/public/.

test_results_detail.header_apercu_desktop: PASS - nav link shows 'Aperçu' pointing to /exemples

test_results_detail.exemples_faq_accordion: PASS - 6 questions from faqsExemples, opens/closes correctly

test_results_detail.offres_toggle_badge_below: PASS - badge '2 mois offerts' appears below toggle (y=1053.6 > toggle bottom 1040.6), 0px horizontal shift
test_results_detail.home_toggle_badge_below: PASS - badge '2 mois offerts' appears below toggle, 0px horizontal shift
